positioning.oneLiner: CALL is a school-wide leadership assessment and feedback system for professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.
positioning.summary: The Comprehensive Assessment of Leadership for Learning provides tools, customized services, and feedback systems that support school and district leaders with leadership development, professional growth, and school improvement planning. Because CALL source content is more specific to assessment and feedback systems, generated copy should stay disciplined and avoid broad claims beyond leadership for learning.

audiences.name: principals
needs: Understand leadership practices across a school
Use feedback to guide improvement planning
Connect assessment data to professional growth
approvedMessages: CALL provides a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.
CALL supports professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.
CALL focuses on leadership, improvement, and the work.

audiences.name: district leaders
needs: Support school improvement planning across sites
approvedMessages: CALL is a school- and district-wide leadership assessment and feedback system.
School and district leaders use CALL to support school improvement planning, professional development planning, and comprehensive needs assessments.
CALL Systems are built on principles that leadership is not confined to a single person and data should be practical and action-oriented.

audiences.name: education leaders
needs: Clarify how CALL connects leadership development and improvement work
See whether CALL is the right WCEPS pathway
approvedMessages: CALL provides unique tools and customized services to support leadership for learning.
CALL includes a reporting system used by school and district leaders as a tool for school improvement work.
CALL provides actionable, formative feedback including customized strategies and action plans for school improvement.

proofPoints: The CALL homepage describes CALL as a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system.
The CALL site says CALL provides unique tools and customized services for professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.
The What We Do page says CALL is school- and district-wide.
The What We Do page says CALL Primary was developed and validated at the University of Wisconsin-Madison.
approvedPhrases: Comprehensive Assessment of Leadership for Learning
school-wide leadership assessment and feedback system
restrictedClaims: Do not imply CALL guarantees improvement results.
Do not position CALL as an individual performance evaluation product.
Do not overstate CALL's multilingual learner focus unless specifically referencing WIDA SIS or CCNA with source evidence.

sections: Hero with leadership and improvement focus

sourceEvidence.label: CALL homepage description
sourceEvidence.excerpt: A user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.

sourceEvidence.label: CALL professional growth and leadership development
sourceEvidence.excerpt: The Comprehensive Assessment of Leadership for Learning (CALL) provides unique tools and customized services to support professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.

sourceEvidence.label: CALL focus
sourceEvidence.excerpt: Focus on leadership. Focus on improvement. Focus on the work.

sourceEvidence.label: CALL What We Do
sourceEvidence.excerpt: The Comprehensive Assessment of Leadership for Learning (CALL) is a school- and district-wide leadership assessment and feedback system.

sourceEvidence.label: CALL principles
sourceEvidence.excerpt: The CALL Systems and the CARE Process were built on the principles that school leadership is critical to enhancing teaching and learning, leadership is not confined a single person, data should be practical and action-oriented, and support for practitioners is best provided through inquiry-based coaching processes.
